title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Whoa! How many did you get?!
choice_data_list: Check them out. What's your appraisal?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
No doubt they're cute. The facial expressions are
captured well too, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But probably the best thing I learned today is
that you're pretty good at games.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So, this is just hypothetically speaking, but...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Next time you come here, if they happen to have
a new version of me, you need to get it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best so they'll have to make a Cutie of me.
